generation_rules: Use Page Object Model with a dedicated class per page
Define locators as class attributes using Playwright locator strings
Use pytest fixtures for browser setup and page object construction
Parametrize test cases where multiple input variants are needed
Test function names must be prefixed with test_
Use sync_playwright by default; use async_playwright only if the caller requests async
Import page fixtures from conftest.py; do not instantiate Page directly in tests
Return the full generated content inside a JSON artifact block
description: Pytest Python POM: generates page objects, test specs, and fixtures using POM pattern with Playwright
